message:
Remove Python FFI - replace with pure Zig C interop

CRITICAL: Remove Python C API dependency to achieve pure Zig compilation.

Removed:
- packages/runtime/src/python.zig (294 lines) - Python C API wrapper
- Python subprocess calls from compiler.zig (getPythonPaths function)
- Python library linking (-lpython3.12, include paths)
- python.zig from runtime_files list

Impact:
- Binaries no longer depend on libpython
- No more python3 subprocess calls during compilation
- Pure Zig compilation path (Layer 1 only)

Next steps (TODO):
- Remove python_ffi_vars tracking from codegen
- Replace python_ffi.zig with c_ffi.zig for direct C interop
- Fix JSON cache incref loop bug

Partial cleanup - builds successfully.
